summary: SDM Payment System Phase 1 - Complete testing of MoMo, Card, Cash payments with split calculation. All 19 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified for merchant dashboard (QR display, payment method selector, split preview, cash balance) and client dashboard (pending payments with confirm/reject buttons).

split_calculation_verification.formula: Amount × CashbackRate% = TotalCashback, SDMCommission = TotalCashback × 10%, ClientCashback = TotalCashback - SDMCommission
split_calculation_verification.example: 100 GHS @ 8% = 8 GHS total, SDM gets 0.8 GHS, Client gets 7.2 GHS, Merchant gets 92 GHS
